name: Rahul
key_context: Broken relationship; limited emotional support at home; uses social media to vent; drinks & smokes; high discretionary spends (Zomato/Swiggy/Amazon).
primary_goals: Stabilize mood, improve sleep/energy, reduce impulse spending, rebuild support system.

name: Suchithra
key_context: Lives in luxury retirement home; son in the US; has Diabetes + Hypertension; tends to go silent/withdraw; weekly call with grandchildren is her main joy.
primary_goals: Maintain stable vitals, stay socially connected, avoid unnoticed health deterioration.

name: Farhan
key_context: Running business for years; recent employee + contract challenges; cash locked, loans; drinks; poor sleep; daughter (21) marriage challenges (horoscope).
primary_goals: Regain decision clarity, stabilize sleep, navigate cashflow/loan schedule, manage family stress.

name: Arpit
key_context: Relationship issues; career & study stress; peer pressure; overweight; bullied; inferiority complex; needs supportive monitoring.
primary_goals: Improve confidence, build routine for studies/career, increase activity, reduce anxiety.
